Author: Ruby Blaire
Name: Ruby Radio
Punchline: Live radio for your time in Eorzea.
Description: A listener-only Ruby Radio plugin with a cornflower-blue, seafoam, and obsidian player. Paste a public Tailscale or hosted Ruby Radio room link, connect, and hear the opt-in broadcast through your Windows audio device. Includes now-playing progress, saved listener volume, and a Ruby Radio Discord link.
